description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named test that runs in the default test stage using the python Docker image. The job executes the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y tor, apt-get install -y firefox-esr, pip3 install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt, pip3 install --require-hashes -r requirements-dev.txt, pip3 install --require-hashes -r requirements-notifications.txt, python3 --version, and make test. No additional services, caches, artifacts, or variables are defined. The job runs on all branches without any specific rules.
